description: Delivers the account management screens (edit profile, change password, delete account), app settings/preferences screen, about screen, and wires role-based bottom tab navigation using the tabs.config.ts factory from MVP 1. Also adds the onboarding flow for first-launch.

api.name: changePassword
api.description: Change password — requires current password for verification

api.name: deleteAccount
api.description: Permanently delete the authenticated user's account. Requires password confirmation.

role_based_navigation.description: getTabsForRole() in src/navigation/tabs.config.ts returns the tab config for the authenticated user's role. (app)/_layout.tsx maps over it. Adding a new role or tab requires only a change to tabs.config.ts.
rules: Profile/Settings are accessed via header icon or profile tab — not in bottom nav for template default
If user.role is undefined, fall back to 'user' tab config — never crash

onboarding.description: First-launch only. Shown before sign-in. Skippable. State persisted in usePreferencesStore (hasSeenOnboarding flag).

slides.title: Welcome
slides.description: Placeholder slide 1 — replace with your app value prop

behavior: Check hasSeenOnboarding in usePreferencesStore on app boot
If false and user is unauthenticated: show onboarding before sign-in
On skip or finish: set hasSeenOnboarding=true, navigate to sign-in
Never show again after first completion
Android back button on onboarding: go to previous slide, on slide 0 exit app

pages.name: OnboardingScreen
pages.description: First-launch swipeable slides. Skippable. Shown only once.

actions.name: skip
actions.description: Skip onboarding and go to sign-in

pages.name: ProfileScreen
pages.description: Account overview. Shows user info, links to edit profile, change password, delete account.

actions.name: signOut
actions.description: Sign out — clears session, redirects to sign-in

pages.name: EditProfileScreen
pages.description: Edit first name and last name. Email is read-only.

pages.name: ChangePasswordScreen
pages.description: Change password — requires current password, new password, confirm new password.

pages.name: DeleteAccountScreen
pages.description: Permanent account deletion. Requires password confirmation. Two-step: confirm intent then enter password.

actions.name: confirmDeleteAccount
actions.triggers: calls API then clears session and redirects to sign-in

pages.name: SettingsScreen
pages.description: App preferences: theme toggle (light/dark/system), language selector (placeholder). Persisted in usePreferencesStore.

pages.name: AboutScreen
pages.description: App version, terms of service link, privacy policy link.

forms.error_message: Could not update profile. Try again.
Current password is incorrect or request failed.

data_flow: 1. User navigates to profile from home screen header icon or bottom tab
2. ProfileScreen reads user from useAuthStore — no API call needed, already in session
3. User taps Edit Profile — navigates to EditProfileScreen
4. Form pre-filled from useAuthStore session data
6. On success: update useAuthStore session with new user data, show success toast, navigate back
7. On delete account: after DELETE success, call logout flow — clear store, clear cache, replace to sign-in

acceptance_criteria.given: A user with role 'admin' signs in
acceptance_criteria.then: Admin tab is visible alongside Home tab — no code change needed, only role in session

acceptance_criteria.given: A first-time user opens the app
acceptance_criteria.when: They have not seen onboarding before
acceptance_criteria.then: Onboarding slides appear before sign-in screen

acceptance_criteria.given: A user has completed onboarding once
acceptance_criteria.then: Onboarding does not appear — they go directly to sign-in or app

acceptance_criteria.given: A user updates their first name
acceptance_criteria.when: Edit profile form is submitted successfully
acceptance_criteria.then: Home screen greeting reflects the new name immediately — Zustand session updated

acceptance_criteria.given: A user attempts to delete their account
acceptance_criteria.then: Error message shown, account is not deleted, they remain on the screen

acceptance_criteria.given: A user changes their theme to dark
acceptance_criteria.then: Dark theme is applied on boot — preference persisted in usePreferencesStore

empty_error_state_enforcement.description: All data screens built in this MVP must use EmptyState and ErrorState components from MVP 2. This is the first MVP with real data screens.
contract: ProfileScreen: isLoading → SkeletonLoader, isError → ErrorState with refetch, data exists → render profile
EditProfileScreen: isLoading (initial data) → SkeletonLoader, isError → ErrorState, data exists → pre-filled form

notification_permission_primer.description: Android 13+ (API 33+) requires explicit POST_NOTIFICATIONS permission. The primer screen explains why before the OS dialog appears. Shown contextually after onboarding on first launch — not on every boot.
notification_permission_primer.timing: After onboarding completes (or is skipped), before navigating to sign-in — one-time only
behavior: Check if already asked — use hasSeenNotificationPrimer boolean in usePreferencesStore
If not seen and platform is Android: show primer modal/screen
Primer explains: 'Allow notifications to get real-time updates'
Two actions: Allow (triggers OS dialog) and Not Now (skips, sets hasSeenNotificationPrimer=true)
After OS dialog resolves (granted or denied): set hasSeenNotificationPrimer=true, proceed to sign-in
Never ask again regardless of OS dialog outcome

edge_cases: Delete account Android back button during password confirmation — back cancels using BackHandler, does not submit partial form
EditProfileForm must update useAuthStore session on success — not just show a toast. Stale name in Zustand causes greeting to show old name.
OnboardingScreen swipe gesture must not conflict with React Navigation gesture handler — wrap PagerView with GestureHandlerRootView or use Reanimated carousel
AboutScreen app version must use Constants.expoConfig.version from expo-constants — not hardcoded
Theme preference must be applied before splash screen hides — flash of wrong theme is a bad first impression on Android
If role field is missing from JWT/session, getTabsForRole must default to 'user' config — never throw
Notification primer must not appear if user has already granted notification permission — check existing permission status first with expo-notifications getPermissionsAsync()
out_of_scope: Avatar/photo upload — requires file upload infra, not in template scope
Biometric re-auth for delete account — nice to have, not in template scope
Admin screen content — template provides the tab slot only, app fills it
Language switching implementation — selector placeholder only, i18n library integration left to app
